questions.question: What does overfitting mean?
options: The model learns general patterns from data
The model memorizes training data too closely
The model ignores the training data

questions.question: What is a key problem caused by overfitting?
options: The model performs poorly on new data
The model uses too little memory

questions.question: What does it mean for a model to generalize?
options: It performs well on new, unseen data
It reduces the size of the dataset

questions.question: Which situation suggests overfitting?
options: The model performs equally on all data
The model performs better on test data than training data
The model performs much better on training data than test data
The model does not use training data
